validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_info_pmc WHERE name IS NULL OR name = ''
validation_queries.error_message: PMC entries are missing a name

validation_queries.description: Validate agent absolute index is non-negative
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_info_agent WHERE absolute_index < 0
validation_queries.error_message: Negative absolute_index found in agent metadata

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_info_pmc WHERE is_derived = 1 AND (expression IS NULL OR expression = '')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_info_pmc WHERE description IS NULL OR description = ''
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_pmc_event WHERE id IS NULL

validation_queries.description: Check for NULL values in 'guid' where guid count > 3000
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_pmc_event WHERE guid IS NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_pmc_event WHERE guid = rocpd_pmc_event.guid) > 3000
validation_queries.error_message: NULL 'guid' found for guid values with more than 3000 occurrences

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_pmc_event WHERE event_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_pmc_event WHERE pmc_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE id IS NULL

validation_queries.description: Check for NULL values in 'guid' where guid count > 3000
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE guid IS NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE guid = rocpd_sample.guid) > 3000
validation_queries.error_message: NULL 'guid' found for guid values with more than 3000 occurrences

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE track_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE timestamp IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE event_id IS NULL
